tasks.subject: PR1 Task 1: Add templ to flake + justfile + .gitignore
tasks.description:
Goal: templ available in nix develop and as a build input; *_templ.go ignored; just generate recipe runs codegen; just check enforces drift gate.

```json:metadata
{"files":["flake.nix","justfile",".gitignore"],"verifyCommand":"nix develop --command templ version && just generate && just check","acceptanceCriteria":["templ available in nix develop","nix build succeeds","just generate runs templ generate","just check includes drift gate",".gitignore excludes *_templ.go"]}
```

tasks.subject: PR1 Task 2: Vendor htmx + response-targets
tasks.description:
Goal: htmx 2.0.4 and response-targets 2.0.4 vendored, embedded, served at versioned URLs under /ui/vendor/.

```json:metadata
{"files":["cmd/breezyd/ui/vendor/htmx-2.0.4.min.js","cmd/breezyd/ui/vendor/htmx-response-targets-2.0.4.min.js","cmd/breezyd/ui/vendor/README.md","cmd/breezyd/ui_assets.go","cmd/breezyd/ui_assets_test.go","cmd/breezyd/server.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./cmd/breezyd -run TestVendorAssets -v","acceptanceCriteria":["vendored JS served at /ui/vendor/<name>","correct headers set","path traversal blocked"]}
```

tasks.subject: PR1 Task 3: Extract CSS to style.css and tokenize colors
tasks.description:
Goal: All CSS pulled out of index.html into style.css, every color expressed as var(--token), light-mode visually byte-identical.

```json:metadata
{"files":["cmd/breezyd/ui/style.css","cmd/breezyd/ui/index.html","cmd/breezyd/ui_assets.go"],"verifyCommand":"just check && just test-ui","acceptanceCriteria":["no <style> in index.html","all colors use var(--token)","screenshots byte-identical"]}
```

tasks.subject: PR1 Task 4: Add dark-mode CSS overrides
tasks.description:
Goal: prefers-color-scheme + data-theme overrides for every color token. No JS yet — purely CSS.

```json:metadata
{"files":["cmd/breezyd/ui/style.css","tests/ui/dashboard.spec.ts"],"verifyCommand":"just test-ui -- --grep \"dark mode\"","acceptanceCriteria":["prefers-color-scheme block","data-theme=dark block","data-theme=light forces light"]}
```
